requirements: The Student Performance Prediction System should analyze student data such as attendance, assignment scores, exam marks, and participation to predict academic performance. The system should help teachers identify students who may need additional support and provide insights through reports and visualizations, enabling early intervention and improved learning outcomes.

user_stories.title: Develop a feature to analyze student data for performance prediction
user_stories.goal: To use the system to analyze student data and predict academic performance
user_stories.benefit: Identify students who may need additional support and provide early intervention for improved learning outcomes
acceptance_criteria: System should be able to import student data such as attendance, assignment scores, exam marks, and participation
System should analyze student data to predict academic performance
System should provide reports and visualizations to help teachers identify students who may need additional support

user_stories.title: Create a user interface for teachers to view student performance reports
user_stories.goal: To access student performance reports through the system
user_stories.benefit: Easily identify students who may need additional support and take early intervention measures
acceptance_criteria: User interface should be accessible through the Student Performance Prediction System
Teachers should be able to view student performance reports
Reports should include student data such as attendance, assignment scores, exam marks, and participation

user_stories.title: Implement data visualization tools to help teachers understand student performance trends
user_stories.goal: To use data visualization tools to understand student performance trends
user_stories.benefit: Identify patterns and trends in student performance data to inform interventions
acceptance_criteria: System should include data visualization tools such as charts and graphs
Teachers should be able to view student performance data in visual format
Visualizations should accurately represent student performance data
